nodes.name: Buff-rumped thornbill
nodes.summary: Buff-rumped thornbill（Buff-rumped thornbill，学名 Acanthiza reguloides），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: Cobar
nodes.summary: Cobar是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Buff-rumped thornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chinchilla, Queensland
nodes.summary: Chinchilla, Queensland是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括绿宝石鹦鹉、Buff-rumped thornbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Primarily distributed in eastern Australia, the buff-rumped thornbill's range spans from Chinchilla, Queensland, west to Cobar, New South Wales, across Victoria and southeastern South Australia. This is an area of approximately 2 000 000 km2. This adaptable species thrives in dry sclerophyll forests and open eucalypt woodlands that have an open or sparse understorey. [[File:Distribution of the Buff Rumped Thornbill in Australia.jpg|thumb|Distribution of Acanthiza reguloides within Australia
